segments.name: Harbour Bridge Southbound
segments.notes: Southbound only. Peak: 6:30-9:30am & 4-7pm weekdays. Off-peak: 9:30am-4pm weekdays & 8am-8pm weekends. Night: 7pm-6:30am weekdays & 8pm-8am weekends.

segments.name: Harbour Tunnel Southbound
segments.notes: Southbound only. Same time-of-day pricing as bridge.
